def: Pertaining to, derived from, or containing, yttrium.
Closely united by the coalescence, or sticking together, ofcontiguous faces, as in the case of the cotyledons of the live-oakacorn.
To grace or honor exceedingly or beyond desert. [R.] Beau. &Fl.
That portion of an anthocarpous fruit which is not derived fromthe ovary, as the soft part of a strawberry or of a fig.
Capable of being perpetrated. R. North.
Wearing a visor; masked.Visored falsehood and base forgery. Milton.

Possessed of, or characterized by, expedition, or efficiencyand rapidity in action; performed with, or acting with, expedition;quick; having celerity; speedily; as, an expeditious march ormessenger.-- Ex`pe*di"tious*ly, adv.-- Ex`pe*di"tious*ness, n.
Like lava, or composed of lava; lavic.
Healthy nutrition; soundless as regards the nutritivefunctions.
